decision: Chorus + Clearing architecture overview — document + address concerns

steps.notes: Chorus + Clearing architecture doc written: SQLite FTS5 schema (4 tables, 23.6k records), 5 ingestion pipelines, 3 query interfaces (shell, HTTP, skill), ambient indexing daemon, Clearing session lifecycle, participant system, Socket.IO protocol, 12 concerns cataloged (6 Chorus, 6 Clearing).
Reviewed: clean deep dive. Schema, 5 pipelines, 12 concerns well-prioritized. Voice quality (C#37) correctly the biggest gap. Refs backfill is a quick win. No structural issues.
